flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Wisconsin-Green Bay fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (54.6% → 48.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Wisconsin-Green Bay rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $8.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wisconsin-Green Bay fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
